findings.title: Integer overflow in line item total calculation
findings.description: Multiplication of int quantity by int unit_price_cents can exceed INT_MAX

findings.title: Integer overflow in subtotal accumulation
findings.description: Running int sum of line totals overflows when multiple large items are accumulated

findings.title: Integer overflow in discount calculation
findings.description: Intermediate multiplication of large subtotal by discount_percent overflows int

findings.title: Integer overflow in buffer size calculation
findings.description: int multiplication of item_count * item_size overflows before cast to size_t for malloc

findings.title: Integer overflow in shipping cost calculation
findings.description: Multiplication of weight_grams by distance_km overflows int for large shipments

findings.title: Truncation in currency conversion result
findings.description: 64-bit intermediate result truncated to int on return, losing data for large conversions

findings.title: Unchecked narrowing in parse_quantity
findings.description: strtol returns long cast to int without range validation, truncating large values
